mapper.update: UPDATE integrated_health_data SET device_name = #{deviceName}, device_mac = #{deviceMac}, update_time = NOW(), knee = #{knee}, temperature = #{temperature}, walk = #{walk}, speed = #{speed}, distance = #{distance}, remark = #{remark} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO integrated_health_data (device_name, device_mac, user_id, create_time, update_time, knee, temperature, walk, speed, distance, remark) VALUES (#{deviceName}, #{deviceMac}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{knee}, #{temperature}, #{walk}, #{speed}, #{distance}, #{remark})
